name_en: Cherry Tree of Nagasawa
description_en: A monument in the natural monument category, the cherry tree of Nagasawa. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2005-02-01. Located at Ōta Aza Nagasawa 224.

name_en: Cherry Tree of Serizawa
description_en: A monument in the natural monument category, the cherry tree of Serizawa. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2013-07-01. Located at Serizawa 98.

name_romaji: Nihonshi Tōzanbu Mutsu Dewa Ryōkoku Zu
name_en: Map of Mutsu and Dewa Provinces, Eastern Mountain Section of the Nihonshi
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the painting category, a map of Mutsu and Dewa provinces from the eastern mountain section of the Nihonshi. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1970-10-30.

name_en: Seated Statue of Kokūzō Bodhisattva with Attendants at Iwaya
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a seated statue of Kokūzō Bodhisattva with flanking attendants (kyōji) at Iwaya. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1970-10-30.

name_en: Tetsugen Edition of the Great Wisdom Sutra at Ryūsen-ji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the classical texts category, the Tetsugen-edition Great Perfection of Wisdom Sutra held at Ryūsen-ji Temple. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1972-01-17.

name_en: Colored Silk Buddha Nirvana Painting of Ryūsen-ji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the painting category, a color-on-silk painting of the Buddha's nirvana held at Ryūsen-ji Temple. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1972-03-22.

name_en: Colored Silk Painting of the Sixteen Good Deities of Ryūsen-ji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the painting category, a color-on-silk painting of the Sixteen Good Deities held at Ryūsen-ji Temple. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1972-03-22.

name_en: Votive Tablet of the Kangiten Shrine at Kinzō-ji Temple
description_en: A tangible folk cultural property, a votive tablet (ema) of the Kangiten shrine at Kinzō-ji Temple. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1972-12-26.

name_en: Nenbutsu Cedar of Ōkubo
description_en: A monument in the natural monument category, the Nenbutsu cedar of Ōkubo. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1972-12-26.

name_en: Kōyamaki of Mount Horikoshi at Aza
description_en: A monument in the natural monument category, the kōyamaki (umbrella pine) of Mount Horikoshi at Aza. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1975-01-17.

name_en: Materials Related to Andō Yūeki (One Lot)
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, a lot of materials related to Andō Yūeki. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1975-01-17.

name_romaji: Shinpuku-ji Daihannya Haramitta-kyō Kan Daiichi Dōkyōten Urauchi Monjo
name_en: Volume One of the Great Wisdom Sutra and Its Backing Documents at Shinpuku-ji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, volume one of the Great Wisdom Sutra (Daihannya Haramitta-kyō) together with documents backing the same scripture, held at Shinpuku-ji Temple. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1975-01-21.

name_romaji: Saikō-ji Mokuzō Amida Nyorai Zazō Kyōji Tainaibutsu
name_en: Wooden Seated Amida Nyorai with Attendants and Womb Statue at Saikō-ji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a wooden seated statue of Amida Nyorai with flanking attendants (kyōji) and an enshrined womb statue (tainaibutsu), held at Saikō-ji Temple. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1980-04-09.

name_en: Pair of Wooden Vases
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the crafts category, a matched pair of wooden vases. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1980-04-09.

name_romaji: Udakaeriyama Ōyamazumi-jinja Sandō Suginamiki to Keidaisha Boku
name_en: Cedar-Lined Approach and Precinct Shrine Trees of Ōyamazumi Shrine at Udakaeriyama
description_en: A monument in the natural monument category, the cedar-lined approach and the sacred precinct trees of Ōyamazumi Shrine at Udakaeriyama. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1980-04-09.

name_romaji: Aza Akagi-jinja no Sha Boku Kōyamaki Asunaro Momi
name_en: Sacred Trees of Akagi Shrine at Aza: Kōyamaki, Asunaro, and Fir
description_en: A monument in the natural monument category, the sacred trees of Akagi Shrine at Aza, comprising kōyamaki, asunaro, and fir. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1980-04-09.

name_en: Milestone Mound in Front of Nozawa Suwa Shrine
description_en: A monument in the historic site category, a milestone mound (ichirizuka) in front of Nozawa Suwa Shrine. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1983-02-18.

name_en: Complete Set of Estate Puppet-Theater Properties
description_en: A tangible folk cultural property, a complete set of estate puppet-theater properties. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1983-02-18.

name_en: Gong of Nyohō-ji Temple (Waniguchi)
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the crafts category, a bell-gong (waniguchi) of Nyohō-ji Temple. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1983-02-18.

name_en: Balustrade Finials of the Kannon Hall of Nyohō-ji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the crafts category, the balustrade finials (giboshi) of the Kannon hall of Nyohō-ji Temple. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1983-02-18.

name_en: Carved-Copy Shrine Tablet "Matsuo Daimyōjin" in Ryōkan's Hand
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the crafts category, a carved-copy shrine tablet reading "Matsuo Daimyōjin" reproduced from the brushwork of Ryōkan. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1985-07-30.

name_en: Memorial Stupa for Victims of the Keichō Earthquake at Ōsugiyama Village
description_en: A monument in the historic site category, a memorial stupa for the victims of the Keichō earthquake at Ōsugiyama village. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1985-07-30.

name_romaji: Ryūzō-ji Yakushi Rurikō Nyorai Omikuji Yōgu Isshiki
name_en: Complete Set of Fortune-Slip Implements of the Yakushi Buddha at Ryūzō-ji Temple
description_en: A tangible folk cultural property, a complete set of fortune-slip (omikuji) implements associated with the Yakushi Rurikō Nyorai at Ryūzō-ji Temple. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1987-04-01.

name_en: Chinese-Style Chest for the Great Wisdom Sutra at Nyohō-ji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the crafts category, a Chinese-style chest (karabitsu) for the Great Wisdom Sutra at Nyohō-ji Temple. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1988-04-01.

name_romaji: Nyohō-ji Shōtai Dōzō Shō Kannon Zazō Kakebotoke
name_en: Sacred-Body Bronze Seated Shō Kannon Hanging Buddha of Nyohō-ji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the crafts category, a sacred-body (shōtai) hanging buddha (kakebotoke) of a bronze seated Shō Kannon, held at Nyohō-ji Temple. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1988-04-01.

name_romaji: Kyū Zen'ō-ji Shōtai Dōzō Yakushi Nyorai Zazō Kakebotoke
name_en: Sacred-Body Bronze Seated Yakushi Nyorai Hanging Buddha of the Former Zen'ō-ji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the crafts category, a sacred-body (shōtai) hanging buddha (kakebotoke) of a bronze seated Yakushi Nyorai from the former Zen'ō-ji Temple. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1988-04-01.

name_en: Stone Invocation Stupa (Stone Tablet) of Takame Village
description_en: A monument in the historic site category, a stone invocation stupa (myōgō tōba), a stone tablet (itabi), of Takame village. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1988-04-01.

name_en: Hōkyōintō Pagoda of Saikō-ji Temple
description_en: A monument in the historic site category, a hōkyōintō stone pagoda of Saikō-ji Temple. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1989-04-01.

name_en: "Lord's Resting Place" Monument at Naraki Pass
description_en: A monument in the historic site category, the "Lord's Resting Place" (Ue-sama Gokyūsokujo) stone monument at Naraki Pass. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1989-04-01.

name_en: Milestone Mound of Hōkawa
description_en: A monument in the historic site category, the milestone mound (ichirizuka) of Hōkawa. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1990-04-25.

name_en: Persimmon Tree of Jizakai
description_en: A monument in the natural monument category, the persimmon tree of Jizakai. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1990-04-25.

name_en: Fugenzō Cherry of Gejō
description_en: A monument in the natural monument category, the Fugenzō cherry tree of Gejō. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1990-04-25.

name_romaji: Zenkōji-shiki Dōzō Kannon Bosatsu Ryūzō Zenkōji-shiki Dōzō Seishi Bosatsu Ryūzō
name_en: Zenkōji-Style Bronze Standing Kannon and Seishi Bodhisattva Statues
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a Zenkōji-style bronze standing statue of Kannon Bodhisattva and a Zenkōji-style bronze standing statue of Seishi Bodhisattva. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1991-06-01.

name_en: Kyōhō-Era Haiku Monument
description_en: A monument in the historic site category, a haiku monument (kuhi) of the Kyōhō era. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1991-06-01.

name_en: Ōsugiyama Village Land Register of the Eighth Year of Keichō
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, the land register (mizuchō) of Ōsugiyama village dated the eighth year of Keichō. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 1994-03-24.

name_en: Vegetation Around Kōbōiwa Rock at Aza
description_en: A monument in the natural monument category, the vegetation surrounding Kōbōiwa rock at Aza. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 2000-04-25.

name_en: Luehdorf's Butterfly (Gifu Butterfly)
description_en: A monument in the natural monument category, Luehdorf's butterfly (Gifuchō); capture within the town is prohibited. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 2015-04-16.

name_en: Spangle Butterfly (Kimadara Ruritsubame)
description_en: A monument in the natural monument category, the spangle butterfly (Kimadara Ruritsubame); capture within the town is prohibited. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 2015-04-16.

name_en: Materials of the Hasenuma Family
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, materials of the Hasenuma family. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 2020-10-22.

name_en: Wooden Standing Statues of the Kongō Guardian Deities at Nyohō-ji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, wooden standing statues of the Kongō guardian deities (Niō) at Nyohō-ji Temple. Town-designated by Nishiaizu Town on 2025-03-28.
